-fxx-animated.description: Whether the gauge animates value changes.

-fxx-arrow-direction.description: The direction in which the previous/next arrow buttons are oriented.

-fxx-arrow-position.description: The placement of the previous/next arrow buttons relative to the value.

-fxx-days-after-furthest.description: The number of days to display after the furthest displayed day.

-fxx-days-before-furthest.description: The number of days to display before the furthest displayed day.

-fxx-label-dateformat.description: The SimpleDateFormat pattern used to render the day labels.

-fxx-show-ticklabels.description: Whether the tick labels are shown next to the time sliders.

-fxx-show-weeknumbers.description: Whether the ISO week numbers column is shown in the calendar grid.

-fxx-snap-to-minutes.description: The minute granularity to which appointments snap when dragged or resized.

-fxx-tick-color.description: The color of the gauge's major and minor ticks.

-fxx-value-alignment.description: The alignment of the value text within the spinner's value area.

-fxx-value-format.description: The DecimalFormat pattern used to render the gauge's numeric value.
